**Summary**
Provide a short summary of the requested feature.

---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new feature or improvement
title: 
---

## What would you like to see?
Describe the feature or improvement you want in plain language.

## Why is this useful?
Explain the problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

## How would you use it?
Give one or two example scenarios showing how you would use the feature.
